records.title: AWS Ground Station near-real-time telemetry sink and contact observability
records.summary: AWS Ground Station can stream near-real-time antenna telemetry during a contact through a TelemetrySinkConfig bound to a mission profile. Delivery is to Amazon Kinesis Data Streams in the same account and scheduling region. Currently documented telemetry includes commanded and actual azimuth/elevation, plus tracking status and tracking error when autotracking is enabled. Cross-region delivery from the antenna to the scheduling region is supported.
pending_confirmation: stream partition key and ordering behavior
customer-visible tracking error units and thresholds

sources.title: AWS Ground Station - Work with telemetry

records.title: AWS custom OEM ephemeris preview API and vendor-specific CCSDS constraints
records.summary: AWS Ground Station offers a preview Ephemeris API for customer-provided CCSDS Orbit Ephemeris Message data. Access is enabled case by case through AWS Support. Uploaded OEM data overrides Space-Track-derived ephemerides and can support early operations, maneuvers and improved tracking. AWS requires KVN-formatted OEM version 2.0, Earth-centered data, UTC, EME2000 or ITRF2000 reference frames, and mandatory interpolation metadata; unsupported fields can cause validation failure.
pending_confirmation: support for covariance and acceleration terms

sources.title: AWS Ground Station - Provide OEM ephemeris data

records.title: Optical ground-station service economics and hybrid RF-optical architecture
records.summary: A June 2026 systems-engineering assessment argues that optical ground-station bottlenecks have shifted from peak line rate to repeatable service under weather, acquisition, scheduling and operations constraints. It identifies usable duty factor, site diversity, shared-network utilization, interoperability and service assurance as controlling variables, and treats hybrid optical plus RF as the defensible baseline through 2030: optical for throughput and spectrum relief, RF for continuity, contingency and assured command paths.
pending_confirmation: delivered cost under customer traffic concentration

sources.title: Optical Ground Stations for Space Communications: Systems Engineering, Availability, and Service Economics Through 2030
